name: Serie
description: An elven mage who is said to possess knowledge about nearly every magic that exists. She was Flamme's master. She founded the Continental Magic Association around 20 years before Himmel's death. First-class mages get the privilege of meeting her and can ask for any magic they desire.

name: Ultear Milkovich
description: Ultear is introduced as a member of the Magic Council who apparently works for [Siegrain](https://anilist.co/character/22751).

name: Adam  Taylor
description: A highly skilled young knight who serves Noah. He is very quiet and outwardly stoic, particularly with those he does not trust. He is very gullible and likes sweets.He is discriminated against for his Alasa heritage.

name: Kanan Matsuura
description: __Height:__ 162 cm Kanan Matsuura is a third-year student living alone with her grandfather, who runs a diving shop on a nearby island. Breezily mature, she rarely sweats the details and usually maintains a calm, cool demeanor.

name: Kouichi Sakakibara
description: __Occupation__: Middle School Student __Grade__: 3rd year, 3rd class __Height__: 167 cm (5'6") The new transfer student into Yomiyama North Middle School's third year's third class (in May, 1998). He is 15 years old and the only son in the Sakakibara family. His mother supposedly passed away 15 years ago after giving birth to him. He becomes very interested and curious about Mei Misaki and attempts to pursue a friendship with her, but little does he know of the trouble this is going to cause...

name: Suzue Kanbe
description: __Height:__ 171 cm (5'7") A relative of Daisuke.

name: Yuki Minakami
description: Yuki is a habitual truant with a taste for cigarettes who considers herself antisocial, but in fact has an aptitude for getting along with other girls (and for intimidating boys as well). Besides that, Yuki is a fan of classical literature and she spends much of her time reading on the school's rooftop. As a result of her grandfather's stewardship of a kobudo dojo, she became skilled in ancient forms of martial arts.

name: Ayase Aragaki
description: __Height:__ 166 cm Ayase is Kirino's friend and classmate who works as a model alongside her and is also her best friend. Ayase is a friendly, nice, and refined lady, but becomes agitated and somewhat violent at the thought that she is being lied to, which she hates above all else. She tends to believe what she sees on the news. Therefore, she disapproves of anime and manga, calling it a disgusting hobby, especially eroge, due to the media portrayal that otaku will eventually become criminals. O

name: Gorilla
description: The protagonist featured in _1-nichi Go ni Shinu Gorilla_, who is shown to be a gorilla, and has stated he will die the next day. ~!He then unfortunately perishes as had been stated in the first chapter.!~

name: Kasumi Nakasu
description: __Height:__ 155 cm (5'1") Kasumi Nakasu is one of thirteen members of the Nijigasaki High School Idol Club. She was a member of the original group and is a member of QU4RTZ, a unit under Nijigaku. She is a first year student and her image color is pastel yellow. As Kasumin loves all things cute, her unrivaled love for idols is strong and inspired. name: Tetsuo Shima
description: Kaneda's best friend since preschool and the second principal subject of the story's theme. Tetsuo is shown as a black sheep in the gang he and Kaneda are part of, and quietly suffers from a deeply rooted inferiority complex. He admires his friend yet at the same time strongly resents his own reliance upon him. After his psychokinetic abilities manifest, Tetsuo quickly becomes Kaneda's nemesis; he desires Kaneda's motorcycle (a symbol of status and power), and seeks to prove himself supremely po

name: Ai Mizuno
description: __Death:__ August 4, 2008 She was a popular idol in the early 2000s from the idol group called Iron Frill. ~! __Cause of death:__ struck by lightning during a concert. Because of how she died, she is afraid of lighting. !~ When alive, Ai demonstrated a cheerful and determined personality, but after becoming a zombie she became rather skeptical and suspicious. As she gradually begins to warm up to her group, she begins to act like herself. She has shown a supportive side when aiding the other mem

name: Chiaki Oogaki
description: A bright and active person, in charge of choosing the camping spots and gear. She’s lively and cheerful, but is also full of emotion and easily brought to tears. Wanting to camp, she forms the outdoor crew with [Aoi](https://anilist.co/character/124577). (Source: Honey's Anime)

name: Feirune
description: [Shun](https://anilist.co/character/130487/Schlain-Zagan-Analeit)'s pet Earth Wyrm. In her previous life, she was a girl named Shinohara Mirei, but she reincarnated as a monster instead of a human. As a monster, her stats grow at a very fast rate, and she has excellent situational judgment. She has a cheerful, open personality, but she was a bully in her former life, and this shows in her behavior.

name: Kikyou Kushida
description: __Height:__ 155 cm She boasts tremendous popularity among men and women as the D class' idol. She aims to be friends with everyone not just in D class. She wants to get along well with her classmate, Horikita.

name: Laika
description: A dragon girl and Azusa's apprentice. She's fastidious and cares a lot about what others think, but she's a good, earnest, and hardworking girl. Gothic Lolita clothes, maid outfits, and other frilly things suit her very well (which embarrasses her).

description: He is a kindergarten-aged boy whose antics are the basis for the series. His affectionate name is Shin-chan. He is 5 years old and loves Chocobis and an animated superhero named "Action Kamen". He is attracted to older girls and women, despite his young age. He brazenly pursues any girl who catches his eye. name: Hyun-Su Cha
description: The main character of the story. An isolated, lonely teenager who is forced to move when his family dies in a traffic accident. He is eighteen years old and stopped going to high school due to unknown reasons. He spends his time trolling and tricking on internet, as well as playing various RPGs. He sold his old house and moved into Green Home apartments (room 1410) because the money left by his deceased family was insufficient for him to survive as an isolated person. name: Kumo Oni Haha
description: Like most demons, she is cruel, unfeeling, and murderous towards humans. Though after much time with him, she developed fear for Rui and the Father Spider Demon who abused her for being weaker than expected. ~!She was a member of the Spider Family.!~

name: Red
description: Red is very much the quintessential hero; brave, kind, and outgoing. He is capable of feats of agility, and is always willing to help others, with or without the help of his Pokémon. Red is an exceptional Pokémon battler, able to utilize his Pokémon's moves and natural talents in unique ways. Red is sometimes slow to pick up on sensitive matters. He is the last of the original seven Pokédex holders to learn of Yellow's true gender identity. ~!Red's special skill, as described by Dr. Yukinari Oki
